name: Low income single filer
description: Single person earning £25,000 - basic rate taxpayer only

sources.description: Rates identical to 2025/26 (all thresholds frozen). Verified against 2025/26 test vector.
sources.notes: Personal allowance: £12,570. Taxable: £12,430. Income tax (20%): £2,486. NI main band (8%): (£25,000 - £12,570) x 8% = £994.40 => £994. Total deductions: £3,480. Net: £21,520.
